description_long: This house complex features multiple interconnected structures with steep, red gable roofs and a striking black-and-white geometric facade. The main building is large and angular, with several smaller wings and annexes branching off, creating a dynamic, multi-volume layout. The exterior walls are decorated with bold, diagonal black stripes on a white background, giving the house a modern, eye-catching appearance. There are several visible staircases and terraces, as well as a central courtyard area with a green lawn. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical bands, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways, suggesting ample access and integration with an urban environment.
description: A modern, multi-volume house complex with red gable roofs and bold black-and-white geometric facades, featuring terraces, staircases, and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, central courtyard, and the dynamic arrangement of the interconnected buildings with visible staircases and terraces.
description_view_1: From this angle, the large expanse of the red gable roof and the paved driveway are most prominent, with fewer facade details visible.
description_view_2: This side view showcases the full length of the house, the geometric window patterns, and the continuity of the black-and-white facade.
description_view_3: Here, the rear of the house is visible, showing the back entrances, additional staircases, and the integration of green space with the paved areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal and vertical bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a paved approach, and a minimal overhang, integrated into the geometric facade
